summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Abacus FCF Innovation Leaders ETF (ABOT) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Abacus FCF Innovation Leaders index. The fund tracks an index that seeks to provide exposure to US all-cap companies with strong free cash flow and R&D investments. ABOT was launched on Dec 7, 2020 and is issued by Abacus.

holdings.infoBox: ABOT is an equity ETF with a total of 51 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 5.42%, Apple at 4.90%, Broadcom at 3.46%, Alphabet at 3.24%, and QUALCOMM at 2.85%.

summary.pre: ETF holdings data is provided by
summary.post: . Holdings are typically published by the ETF issuer at the end of each trading day.
